name: The %LOCATION_NAME hungers...
description:
%HEX_NAME has a curious regional culture centering around its fantastic food, holding feasts whenever the harvests and hunts allow them. The timing of the festivities always sways towards sooner than later, its more accurate to say they're held to months than to any strict dates. Anything worth mentioning is worth celebrating with a banquet. Their hunger borders on the unnatural.

Something is exerting influence over this place and the nearby ruins seem like a good place to start investigating.
